title: <div><font face="ZapfDingbatsITC">✔</font> Encourages attendance through meaning
content:
✔ Encourages attendance through meaningful consequences.
✔ Allows students to “come back” with effort.
✔ Introduces risk and unpredictability when students are absent.

📌 FINAL LOCK-IN QUESTIONS BEFORE EXECUTING VERSION 7.9

1. Should There Be A Way for Secret Alignments to Be Revealed?

✔ Example: If a student’s actions heavily favor one alignment, should they gain a public title reflecting it?

2. Should There Be a Limit to the Number of Times Someone Can Betray?

✔ Example: If a player keeps switching factions, should they eventually be “exiled” from all factions?

3. Should We Introduce a “Faction War” Event That Forces Conflict?

✔ Example: Midway through the semester, should factions be forced into a major all-out battle that permanently alters the game?
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 467 (chunk 467/555)
